title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent feature available in Claude Pro and Max plans that runs on user computers to automate workflows by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and other applications. The tutorial demonstrates file organization, task scheduling, and calendar integration capabilities.
